meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve 'No Project Ideas' Fast
content.seo_description: Overcome 'no project ideas' using the Antigravity template and Claude Code. A high-level checklist for freelancers to ship production-ready SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'blank canvas syndrome' by providing a pre-architected, modular codebase designed for rapid iteration. By combining this structure with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic and client-specific requirements, ensuring you ship functional, scalable SaaS prototypes in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in an empty IDE—a silent, mocking reminder of the dreaded 'blank canvas' paralysis. You have the skills to build, but the friction of starting from scratch kills your velocity and drains your billable hours. In the high-stakes world of freelance development, time is the only asset that truly matters, and staring at a blank directory is the ultimate profit leak.

Relief has arrived in the form of the Antigravity project template. This isn't just a boilerplate; it's a battle-tested architecture that handles your authentication, state management, and API routing before you even type your first line of custom code. By pairing this with the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a high-velocity AI architect capable of deploying production-grade SaaS solutions on demand.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Clone the core template to establish a production-ready file structure that includes built-in security, logging, and environment configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard SaaS template with TypeScript, Supabase integration, and Tailwind CSS modules.

steps.title: Define Domain Entities
steps.description: Use the template's schema generator to map out your client's data requirements, ensuring type safety across the entire application stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create database schema and TypeScript interfaces for a multi-tenant user system with project management capabilities.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Claude
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to rapidly scaffold your core services, passing the Antigravity structure as context for optimal code placement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core business logic for project status transitions, ensuring it follows the existing modular service architecture.

steps.title: Configure API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure, type-safe API routes that interact seamlessly with your newly defined services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate RESTful endpoints for the project entity, including validation middleware and error handling.

steps.title: Deploy & Verify
steps.description: Perform a final automated check against the Antigravity configuration to ensure the build is ready for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity health check and optimize the build configuration for production deployment on Vercel.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code when modifying the Antigravity core files to prevent accidental structural regression.
Map your project entities to Antigravity's internal 'Service' pattern to ensure your code remains modular and easily refactorable for future client updates.
Use Claude's '@workspace' feature to reference existing Antigravity modules when generating new features to maintain consistent coding standards.
Create a custom 'Antigravity-CLI' alias in your shell to speed up the boilerplate generation process by 30%.
Keep your database migrations separate from application logic to ensure zero-downtime updates during the initial client deployment phase.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, document the specific modules you customized. Save these as custom 'Antigravity Blueprints' to reuse across future freelance contracts, effectively building your own proprietary library of high-value tools.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start delivering high-value SaaS products at record speeds. Your reputation as an elite freelancer depends on your efficiency. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
